name: openai_api_usage_status
description: Fetches OpenAI API usage and costs for a natural-language period: 'this month', 'last month', 'last 3 months', 'today'/'this day', 'yesterday'/'last day', 'this week', 'last week', 'last N days/weeks/months/years', or explicit YYYY-MM-DD YYYY-MM-DD range. Defaults to month-to-date.
help_example: openai stats this month / openai stats last 3 months / openai stats yesterday
